description: Harness-neutral discovery catalog for Live Video Captioning workflow skills. Paths are relative to the repository root.

skills.name: lvc-run-app
skills.description: Run, start, or smoke-test the LVC Docker Compose stack (dashboard on :4173), drive a captioning run against an RTSP stream or simulator, verify captions flow, and check the dashboard.

skills.name: lvc-test
skills.description: Run the LVC backend unit test suite with pytest from app/ and check coverage (>= 80%).
